---
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 100
---

# Import

## Load libraries

```{r libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# General
library(ragg) # graphics device
library(here) # for file access
library(haven) # for importing .xpt

# Statistics
library(matrixStats) # used for weighted variance calculation
library(emmeans) # for pairwise comparisons
library(mgcv) # used to train model

# Visualization
library(kableExtra) # for pretty tables
library(ggthemes) # for theme_few()
library(ggtext) # for element_markdown()
library(ggh4x) # for element_rect()
library(ggridges) # for geom_density_ridges()
library(ggpubr) # for ggarrange()
library(cowplot) # for combined plots
library(sameplot) # for plotting consistently

# Data operations
library(data.table) # for speedy dataframes
library(tidyverse) # for general data operations
library(tidytable) # for fast data loading
```

## Import helpers

```{r get_helpers}
source(here("Scripts", "Helpers", "helpers.R"))
```

## Print params for knitted reports

```{r print_params}
kable(
  as.data.frame(
    unclass(params)
  )
)
```

## Unpack confounders list

We take the param value for confounders and build one lists with all included interactions with age
and one with just the variables.

```{r confounder_list}
confounder_interactions <- trimws(
  strsplit(params$confounders, "_")[[1]]
)

confounder_vars <- confounder_interactions[!grepl(",", confounder_interactions)]
```

## Import data

```{r import_data}
df_raw <- read.csv(here("Data", "dataset_bioage.csv"))
```
